summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (~2058 lines) to 14 modular route files. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly - Overview dashboard, Kanban Tasks, Approvals with keyboard shortcuts, Schedule, and Task detail dialog with trash button.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/v1/ health check returns 200 with 'Mission Control API'
Backend: GET /api/v1/stats returns dashboard stats (pending_approvals, active_agents, total_agents, open_tasks, pending_emails)
Backend: GET /api/v1/brands returns brand list with id, name, slug, color
Backend: GET /api/v1/tasks returns tasks list
Backend: POST /api/v1/tasks creates task, DELETE /api/v1/tasks/{id} deletes it
Backend: PATCH /api/v1/tasks/{id}/status updates task status
Backend: GET /api/v1/action-items alias works (returns tasks)
Backend: GET /api/v1/approvals returns approvals list
Backend: POST /api/v1/approvals/{id}/discard endpoint exists (404 for nonexistent)
Backend: POST /api/v1/approvals/{id}/dismiss alias exists (404 for nonexistent)
Backend: GET /api/v1/schedule returns schedule jobs
Backend: POST /api/v1/schedule creates job, DELETE /api/v1/schedule/{id} deletes it
Backend: GET /api/v1/users returns users list
Backend: POST /api/v1/users creates user, DELETE /api/v1/users/{id} deletes it
Backend: GET /api/v1/activity returns activity feed
Backend: GET /api/v1/templates returns templates list
Backend: POST /api/v1/templates creates template, DELETE /api/v1/templates/{id} deletes it
Backend: GET /api/v1/agentmail/inboxes returns inboxes (or 502 if not configured)
Backend: GET /api/v1/calendar/feeds returns calendar feeds
Backend: GET /api/v1/inboxes returns local inboxes
Backend: GET /api/v1/agents returns agents list
Backend: WebSocket /api/v1/ws connects, responds to ping with pong, sync_state returns approvalQueue/actionItems/activity
Frontend: Overview dashboard loads with 3 stat cards (27 pending approvals, 54 open tasks, 104 pending emails)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works (Overview, Approvals, Tasks, Inboxes, Schedule, Calendar, Activity, Settings)
Frontend: Kanban Tasks view loads with 4 columns (Open 38, In Progress 6, Approval 10, Completed 7)
Frontend: Approvals view loads with keyboard shortcuts hint bar (↑↓ navigate, A approve, D discard, Esc deselect)
Frontend: Task detail dialog opens when clicking a task card
Frontend: Trash button visible in task detail dialog (bottom left with trash icon)
Frontend: Task detail dialog shows Due Date, Priority, Assigned To, Created, Description, Your Notes, Move To buttons
Frontend: Schedule page loads with scheduled jobs list
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all 14 modular route files working correctly
WebSocket endpoint properly handles ping/pong and sync_state messages
All CRUD operations for tasks, users, schedule, templates working as expected
No breaking changes detected after refactoring
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed tasks, users, schedule jobs, and templates during testing - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from monolithic server.py (2058 lines) to 14 modular route files. All /api/v1/* endpoints remain identical. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_api_regression.py covers all major endpoints. WebSocket tested separately with Python websockets library. Frontend fully functional with Overview dashboard, Kanban Tasks (4 columns), Approvals (with keyboard shortcuts), Schedule, and Task detail dialog (with trash button visible).
